PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-04-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Shustoff, for Petitioner Lily Chan.
The Court inquired whether there was any additional evidence to overcome the presumption that the will was revoked. Mr. Shustoff responded that he was the attorney who had prepared the decedent's will, and that the decedent would have come to him to revoke it. He stated that at the time of the decedent's death, his apartment at Park merced was crammed full of stuff, and that it had taken a three-man crew from Park merced 36 hours to clear out his apartment. He believes that in the process, the original will was removed and lost at that time. The Court stated that he would grant petitioner until July 27, 2015 to make any supplemental evidentiary filing supporting the petition, at which time the matter will be taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy K. Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-22-2015 Continued To Jul-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
